note: Two changes that move the Slingshot/lottery visibility from the sparkline into the LATEST BLOCKS table — easier to read and more precise. (1) DIFF HISTORY chart restored to the original purple-dot rendering (no magenta halos, no vertical accent lines, no top triangles, no Slingshot counter badge in the sub-info). The chart is now strictly a difficulty curve again. (2) New LOTTERY column appended to LATEST BLOCKS: PAYOUT blocks render the lottery winner address (linked to the address detail panel, magenta with 🎰 prefix) and the SOST amount; NORMAL / UPDATE_EMPTY / pre-Phase-2 blocks render a dash. colspan widened to 9 in loading and error rows. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
